All parties present atipulate to Judge Pro Tem William Lynn hearing today's motion. All parties and Judge Pro Tem Lynn authorize the clerk to sign the Judge Pro Tem stipulation on their behalves.

PLAINTIFF HELEN LE Motion Compelling Further Responses To Interogatories And For Sanctions (Megan V. Megan) is Granted in part/Denied in part. Requests for sanctions is denied. Plaintiff's counsel is to prepare a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.1312 (approval as to form) and then email the proposed order to Judge Pro Tem William Lynn at williamclynn@gmail.com
